info.name: LEAD-93 v2 Contract - Full Sequential Run
info.description: One-click QA regression for all 28 v2 endpoints. It discovers Category and Tag fixtures, creates isolated source/target Categories and Templates, derives every runtime identifier from API responses, uses a dynamic future schedule time, and removes all temporary data at the end. Keep request order unchanged and set enableWriteTests=true.

item.name: 01 Independent Queries
item.description: Read-only APIs with no test-data dependency. Any failure stops the main run before data creation.

exec: console.warn('Channel list API is skipped by default (cannot be tested in local environment).');
pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Channel list is available', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });

item.name: 04 Preflight - Category Tree and Initialise Run

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });
pm.test('Category tree is available', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array'); });

if (json.responseCode === '00000000') { const order = json.data.map((item, index) => ({categoryId: String(item.id ?? item.categoryId), sortOrder: index + 1})); pm.environment.set('initialRootOrderJson', JSON.stringify(order)); }

item.name: 05 Preflight - Tag Taxonomy and Select Valid Tags

exec: pm.test('Response is JSON', function () { json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json).to.be.an('object'); });

pm.test('IIC response envelope exists', function () { pm.expect(json).to.have.property('requestId'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseCode'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('responseMessage'); pm.expect(json).to.have.property('data'); });
pm.test('Response time is below 10 seconds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(10000); });

pm.test('Mandatory tag groups are available', function () { const expected = ['CONTENT_TYPE', 'TRIGGER', 'LIFECYCLE_STAGE', 'FINANCIAL_NEED']; pm.expect(json.data).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty; pm.expect(json.data.map(group => group.groupCode)).to.include.members(expected); const mandatoryGroups = json.data.filter(group => expected.includes(group.groupCode)); pm.expect(mandatoryGroups.every(group => Number(group.isMandatory ?? group.mandatory) === 1)).to.eql(true); });

if (json.responseCode === '00000000') { const selected = json.data.map(group => { const values = group.tagValues || group.values || []; return {groupCode: group.groupCode, tagCodes: Number(group.isMandatory ?? group.mandatory ?? 0) === 1 && values.length ? [values[0].tagCode] : []}; }); pm.environment.set('testTagGroupsJson', JSON.stringify(selected)); }

item.name: 02 Dependency Workflow
item.description: Ordered setup and lifecycle workflow. Newman stops on the first failed request or assertion.
